subject: the AAA model is bigger than i thought
body:
Hey Justin - Liam here.

I just wrapped up AfricAI - an event I led in Cape Town with agency owners who came through my program over the past few years.

It is honestly sick seeing people I mentored running real businesses across voice, automation, and custom software. I am not surprised they made it but I am blown away by what is now possible for anyone building in this space.

What we are shipping at Morningside right now, the engineering systems, the speed of delivery.. it has changed my entire outlook on where this model goes.

And after three years of data, the paths that actually work have never been clearer.

We are not guessing anymore, we are pushing forward - fast.

Keep going,

Liam
